{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations


{quote}- Open Knowledge Work Foundation Concept Document v1.0{quote}

----





h2. AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations

_Companion paper to:_
* Open Knowledge Work Foundation Concept Document v1.0
* Double-Triangle Architecture v1.0
* Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1

_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft  
_Date:_ 2026-04-19  
_Author:_ svend4  
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude  
_License:_ CC BY 4.0  
_Status:_ Working paper, seeking reviewers and collaborators

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] (сходство 0.62)
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] (сходство 0.62)
* [135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md] (сходство 0.40)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md]

* [135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md]
* [152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe|152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md]
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md]
* [AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md]
* [AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution|152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe.md]
* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md]
* [Acknowledgments|182-acknowledgments.md]
* [Acknowledgments|224-acknowledgments.md]
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md]
* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md]
* [Author & Contact|52-author-contact.md]
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md|03-portal-protocol-md.md]
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1|73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1.md]
* [References|183-references.md]
* [References|268-references.md]
* [Table of Contents|137-table-of-contents.md]
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md]
* [with Anthropic's Cowork Platform|306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]

* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md] _33%_

* [Acknowledgments|224-acknowledgments.md] _29%_
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] _29%_

h2. Связанные документы

* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md] _48%_
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] _48%_
* [AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] _48%_
* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md] _42%_
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] _42%_
* [AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution|152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe.md] _37%_
* [PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1|73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1.md] _37%_
* [A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work|135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr.md] _33%_
